name: 🤝 Lane: Handoff Source
description: HANDOFF DEMONSTRATION — This lane encounters a domain boundary it cannot resolve alone (no ORM config). It HANDOFFs to the specialist-lane which owns that capability. Watch for the 🤝 HANDOFF event in the log.

checks.pass: ✅ [handoff] Prisma schema found — can proceed independently
checks.fail: ❌ [handoff] No ORM schema — cannot determine data model without specialist input

checks.prompt: Document what information this lane needs from the specialist: (1) ORM type and configuration needed, (2) schema conventions, (3) migration toolchain. Context from handoff: {retryContext}
